documents.label: Termination (278-TERM)
documents.title: Administrator, Federal Transit Administration
documents.summary: OGE Form 278e Termination Report covering Molinaro's tenure as FTA Administrator, signed 02/20/2026 with date of appointment 08/2025 and date of termination 02/20/2026; OGE-certified 04/07/2026 and marked Data Revised. Discloses NY State and Local Retirement System defined benefit plan (continuing participation), seven outside consulting-fee sources from 2025 (J.E. Lehman & Company $75,000, BIPARTISAN NETWORK $40,000, GP3 Partners/Red Maverick Media $30,000, Corporate Jet Support $25,000, American Mass Timber Enterprises $20,000, Cornell University $15,000, plus spouse's $50,000 from Willow Falls Consulting LLC). Other Assets include State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF (FBVVNX), Genoa Benchmark US Treasury 6 Month Bill ETF, US Bank, Northwest Mutual and State Farm Whole Life policies, and four NY 529 accounts. Section 7 transactions: a 06/20/2025 purchase of FBVVNX ($15,001-$50,000), a 06/02/2025 purchase of Genoa Benchmark US Treasury 20 Year Bond ETF ($50,001-$100,000), and an 11/25/2025 sale of the same Genoa Treasury 20 Year ETF ($15,001-$50,000).

documents.label: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.title: Administrator, Federal Transit Administration
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification signed 08/15/2025 ("Aug 15 2025"). Lists ethics agreement signed 02/28/2025, confirmed 08/02/2025, certification due 11/07/2025. Marks Yes on resignations and N/A on divestitures, 278-T filing, and divestiture-without-278-T rows. Marks Yes on managed accounts, both recusal categories, and initial ethics briefing; N/A on interim recusals and Section 10 additional requirements; No on all three waiver/authorization questions and the Section 8 box marked not applicable.

propublicaCheck.filingsListedThere: Marcus Molinaro did not appear in the ProPublica Trump Team Financial Disclosures landing page check or its top-wealthiest list. The full ProPublica database may include him via search; not verified from the landing page alone.
propublicaCheck.discrepancies: None identified between OGE filings collected here and any ProPublica record. Note Molinaro's tenure was brief (08/2025 to 02/20/2026) and the only filings post-2024-12-01 are the compliance certification and the termination 278e; there is no separate 278-T transaction report in the OGE corpus filtered here.
